file_structure.description: Anchor program crate manifest with anchor-lang, anchor-spl, sha2 dependencies
Program entry point with declare_id!, module declarations, and #[program] instruction handlers
State module barrel export for all account structs
OperatorConfig PDA account struct (singleton, authority/treasury/mint/fee/paused)
CustomerBalance PDA account struct (per-customer balance, caps, counters)
AgentPackage PDA account struct (package metadata, split_bps, counters)
TaskReceipt PDA account struct and TaskStatus enum
Instructions module barrel export for all instruction handlers
initialize_operator instruction: creates singleton OperatorConfig PDA
create_customer_account instruction: creates CustomerBalance PDA for signer
register_agent_package instruction: permissionless AgentPackage PDA creation
update_agent_package instruction: author-only field updates
deposit instruction: SPL token transfer from customer ATA to vault PDA
withdraw instruction: SPL token transfer from vault PDA to customer ATA
update_spending_caps instruction: customer-only cap updates
pause instruction: operator-only circuit breaker toggle on
unpause instruction: operator-only circuit breaker toggle off
Utility module with hash_seed SHA-256 helper and PDA seed constants
Anchor error_code enum with all program error variants
Anchor Mocha smoke tests: 6 core integration tests
Anchor workspace configuration with program ID and cluster settings

scaffolds.interfaces:
use anchor_lang::prelude::*;
use anchor_spl::token::{Mint, Token, TokenAccount};

// === State Accounts ===

/// Singleton operator configuration PDA
/// Seeds: [b"operator_config"]
#[account]
#[derive(InitSpace)]
pub struct OperatorConfig {
    pub authority: Pubkey,
    pub treasury: Pubkey,
    pub mint: Pubkey,
    pub protocol_fee_bps: u16,
    pub paused: bool,
}

/// Per-customer balance and spending limits PDA
/// Seeds: [b"customer_balance", customer.key().as_ref()]
#[account]
#[derive(InitSpace)]
pub struct CustomerBalance {
    pub customer: Pubkey,
    pub balance: u64,
    pub total_deposited: u64,
    pub total_spent: u64,
    pub task_count: u64,
    pub max_per_task: u64,
    pub max_per_day: u64,
    pub daily_spent: u64,
    pub daily_reset_day: u64,
    pub created_at: i64,
}

/// Agent marketplace package PDA
/// Seeds: [b"agent_package", hash_seed(&package_id)]
#[account]
#[derive(InitSpace)]
pub struct AgentPackage {
    #[max_len(64)]
    pub package_id: String,
    pub author: Pubkey,
    pub split_bps: u16,
    #[max_len(256)]
    pub source_uri: String,
    pub total_earned: u64,
    pub task_count: u64,
    pub success_count: u64,
    pub registered_at: i64,
    pub active: bool,
}

/// Immutable task receipt PDA
/// Seeds: [b"task_receipt", hash_seed(&task_id)]
#[account]
#[derive(InitSpace)]
pub struct TaskReceipt {
    #[max_len(64)]
    pub task_id: String,
    pub customer: Pubkey,
    pub amount: u64,
    pub author_earned: u64,
    pub quality_met: bool,
    pub agent_package: Option<Pubkey>,
    pub receipt_hash: [u8; 32],
    pub operator: Pubkey,
    pub settled_at: i64,
    pub status: TaskStatus,
}

/// Task settlement status
#[derive(AnchorSerialize, AnchorDeserialize, Clone, PartialEq, InitSpace)]
pub enum TaskStatus {
    Settled,
    Refunded,
    Disputed,
}

// === Error Codes ===

#[error_code]
pub enum BillingError {
    #[msg("Customer balance insufficient for this operation")]
    InsufficientBalance,
    #[msg("Amount exceeds per-task spending cap")]
    ExceedsPerTaskCap,
    #[msg("Amount would exceed daily spending cap")]
    ExceedsDailyCap,
    #[msg("Signer is not authorized for this operation")]
    Unauthorized,
    #[msg("Program is currently paused")]
    ProgramPaused,
    #[msg("Split basis points must be <= 10000")]
    InvalidSplitBps,
    #[msg("Task ID already exists")]
    DuplicateTaskId,
    #[msg("Token mint does not match configured mint")]
    InvalidMint,
    #[msg("Agent package is not active")]
    PackageInactive,
    #[msg("Amount must be greater than zero")]
    InvalidAmount,
}

file_structure.description: settle_task instruction: 3-case quality-gated settlement with optional agent split
refund_task instruction: reverses settlement, credits customer, treasury absorbs cost
Anchor event structs: TaskSettled, TaskRefunded, Deposited, Withdrawn, AgentPackageRegistered
Update barrel exports with settle_task, refund_task
Register settle_task and refund_task instructions in #[program]
8-case settlement test suite: 3 cases, refund, caps, pause, duplicate
Comprehensive integration test suite with 12 groups, 30+ test cases
Shared test helpers: PDA derivation, mock mint, ATA creation, airdrop
Add test:ci script with --timeout 60000
Add solana-billing feature flag with optional redis, sha2 dependencies
Feature-gated billing module root with BillingError enum and submodule declarations
SettlementEvent struct and EventType enum with serde derives
ReceiptJson struct, CostLineItem, SHA-256 hashing, S3 upload
Redis stream publisher: XADD to cto:settlements with fire-and-forget
SolanaBillingConfig struct with redis_url, S3 bucket, enabled flag
Add #[cfg(feature = "solana-billing")] pub mod billing
Integrate billing hook on terminal CodeRun states (feature-gated)
Sidecar crate manifest with solana-sdk, solana-client, redis, tokio, sha2, tracing
Tokio main entry point: config loading, consumer/health server startup
SidecarConfig struct with env var loading for all settings
SettlementEvent deserialization struct matching controller schema
Redis stream consumer: XREADGROUP, pending recovery, DLQ routing
PDA derivation functions matching on-chain SHA-256 seed logic
Transaction builder: instruction construction for settle_task/refund_task
Transaction submitter with exponential backoff retry and error classification
HTTP /healthz endpoint on :8080 with Redis/Solana connectivity checks
Multi-stage Docker build: rust builder → debian slim runtime
End-to-end integration test: Redis event → Solana tx → on-chain receipt
